title: Zero In Anti-Bacterial Ant & Cockroach Killer – 1 L Spray, Controls Insects and Kills Germs in the Home and Garden, Prevent Repeat Re-Infestations, Ready-To-Use
features: EFFECTIVE: Unique formulation kills ants, cockroaches, and crawling insects, as well as the germs they carry
LONG-LASTING: Prevents re-infestations of ants and other insects for up to 12 weeks
HOME-SAFE: Odourless water-based formulation ideal for use in and around living areas
WATER-BASED: Solvent-free formulation with Cypermethrin and Benzalkonium Chloride anti-bacterial agent
description: Ant & Cockroach Killer from Zero In is a fast-acting surface treatment for tackling ant and cockroach infestations With advanced anti-bacterial action, this water-based formula is ideal for use in and around the home where insect activity is evident, killing ants and cockroaches and the bacteria they leave behind
